label: 区域求并
description: 对两张 0/1 网格做并集：输出尺寸取两者较大；逐格优先取 a 的非零值，a 为零时回退到 b。两输入尺寸不一致时按越界格补 0。
description-en: Per-cell union of two 0/1 grids. Output shape is the per-axis max of both inputs; for each cell, a's non-zero value wins, otherwise b's value is used. Out-of-bounds cells are treated as 0.
icon: 深色背景上两张方形网格部分重叠，重叠区域以更亮颜色显示，左侧网格非零格优先呈现在前景，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: a
inputs.label: 主区域
inputs.description: 主区域；非零格在结果中优先保留。
inputs.description-en: Primary region; its non-zero values take precedence.

inputs.name: b
inputs.label: 次区域
inputs.description: 次区域；仅在 a 对应格为零时填入其值。两者尺寸可不同。
inputs.description-en: Secondary region; only fills cells where a is zero. Shapes may differ.

outputs.name: region
outputs.label: 并集
outputs.description: 两区域并集；尺寸为两输入逐维最大值。
outputs.description-en: Union of the two regions; shape is per-axis max.
